name: Fillet of Fish a L'orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer half of the chopped green onions and sliced mushrooms in a greased 9-inch baking dish.
2. Add the flounder fillets and sprinkle with salt, pepper, and Italian seasoning.
3. Add the remaining onions and mushrooms on top.
4. In a separate bowl, combine olive oil, soy sauce, white wine, orange juice, and Curacao liqueur.
5. Pour the mixture over the vegetables and fish.
6. Cover the dish and bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until the fish is opaque.
7. Sprinkle with paprika and parsley before serving.
